---
title: "Elizabeth Lindsay, Countess of Balcarre"
---

## Elizabeth Lindsay, Countess of Balcarre

**Dates:** (1759-1816)

**Maiden name:** (Dalrymple)

### Biography

She was the subject of a biography by CMY in the first series of <i>Biographies of Good Women</i> (1862).

### Letters

- Letter from March 26th 1861

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
